name: ra-scan
description: Scan your ROM library and identify which games support RetroAchievements

scripts.build:linux: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --bytecode --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile ra-scan
scripts.build:windows: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --bytecode --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile ra-scan
scripts.build:macos: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --bytecode --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile ra-scan
scripts.build:linux-arm: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --bytecode --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile ra-scan
scripts.build:windows-arm: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --bytecode --target=bun-windows-arm64 --outfile ra-scan
scripts.build:macos-arm: npm run build && bun build dist/cli.js --compile --bytecode --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile ra-scan
